小青.source: s：1girl, solo, very long black hair, straight hair, hair reaching buttocks, center parted hair, hair tucked behind ears, exposed ears, long neck, dark brown eyes, apricot eyes, slender, petite, small bust, delicate build, pale skin, flawless skin, flawless skin, cold white skin, translucent skin, hairless body, soft hips, soft thighs, slender fingers, delicate hands, neat nails, natural pink nails, soft fingertips, narrow waist, oval face, pointed chin, upturned eyes
小青.appearance: s：1girl, solo, very long black hair, straight hair, hair reaching buttocks, center parted hair, hair tucked behind ears, exposed ears, long neck, dark brown eyes, apricot eyes, slender, petite, small bust, delicate build, pale skin, flawless skin, flawless skin, cold white skin, translucent skin, hairless body, soft hips, soft thighs, slender fingers, delicate hands, neat nails, natural pink nails, soft fingertips, narrow waist, oval face, pointed chin, upturned eyes
小青.desc: 她拥有一张精致的鹅蛋脸，下巴微尖，双耳轮廓清晰常年外露，鬓发整齐别于耳后，颈部修长优雅。一头中分黑色长发垂落至臀部下沿，发丝均匀柔顺。深棕色虹膜的杏眼灵动清澈，眼尾微微上挑，瞳孔有神充满活力。手指纤细修长，指节匀称，指尖呈柔和的尖圆形，指甲形状规整带有自然微光，双手骨架偏小腕骨纤细。身材纤细娇小，骨架轻盈，胸部微微隆起。皮下脂肪主要堆积于臀部与大腿根部，形成软糯自然的肉感，腰肢纤细四肢匀称。全身肌肤呈现极低饱和度的冷白色，带有半透明的白瓷质感，细腻无瑕，无任何瘢痕、暗沉、皱纹或毛孔，触碰时有凉润感。除头发与眉毛外，全身呈现绝对的光洁无毛状态。
